name: MetricCards
description: A grid of metric cards showing KPIs with values, trends, and sparkline charts. Ideal for analytics dashboards, monitoring agents, and business intelligence views.

visual.description: Responsive grid of metric cards. Each card shows a label, large value, trend indicator (up/down arrow with percentage), and a small sparkline chart. Cards have subtle shadows and rounded corners.

props.name: metrics
props.description: Array of metric objects with label, value, change (percentage), trend (up|down|flat), sparkline (number array)

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in the grid
